info.title: Any Managed Agents API
info.description: Control-plane API for Any Managed Agents. Every resource lives under /api/v1 and follows REST conventions. Command-line automation uses restish or direct HTTP against this OpenAPI document; runtime traffic flows through the /api/v1/runtime protocol-adapter endpoints and canonical session events.

bearerAuth.description: OIDC access token issued by the configured FlareAuth issuer.

archived.description: Lifecycle transition: true archives the agent, false unarchives it.

content.example: Previous heartbeat checked open PRs and deferred billing export.
Checked stale tasks. Follow up on repo resource migration next heartbeat.

archived.description: Lifecycle transition: true archives the environment, false unarchives it.

state.description: Lease transition. `interrupted` is an action, not a resting state: it requeues the work item for recovery and the lease settles as `expired` in the resource.

promptTemplate.example: Research current Canadian banking bonus offers.
Research current Canadian banking bonus offers.
Research current Canadian banking bonus offers.

initialPrompt.example: Research Canadian banking bonus offers and summarize current opportunities.

transport.description: Runtime protocol the connection path speaks.

path.description: Public runtime proxy path to reconnect to; null while no runtime endpoint is attached.

content.example: Please continue the task and summarize the current blocker.
Please continue the task and summarize the current blocker.

result.description: Caller-provided custom tool result recorded instead of executing the tool.
Caller-provided custom tool result recorded instead of executing the tool

get.summary: List federated tenants for the current project

200.description: Federated tenants for the current project

post.summary: Authorize an external issuer tenant for the current project

409.description: A federated tenant with the same issuer and external tenant id already exists

get.summary: Discover available sign-in methods for an organization

post.summary: Complete OIDC sign-in and create an httpOnly session cookie

201.description: Session created. Sets an httpOnly session cookie.

403.description: Request origin is not in the allowed origins list

delete.summary: Sign out and clear the session cookie

204.description: Session cleared. Expires the httpOnly session cookie.

get.summary: List projects in the current organization

post.summary: Create a project in the current organization

schema.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).

parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).
parameters.name: archived

patch.description: Partial update. Lifecycle transitions use the archived flag: {archived: true} archives, {archived: false} unarchives. Field updates on an archived agent are rejected with 409.

get.description: Resolves live agents in the same project that match the requested role or capability, or the agent handoff policy targets. AMA only resolves candidates; the requesting product decides how a handoff affects its own workflow records.

put.description: Idempotent whole replacement of the agent memory singleton.

schema.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).

parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).
parameters.name: archived

patch.description: Partial update. Lifecycle transitions use the archived flag: {archived: true} archives, {archived: false} unarchives. Field updates on an archived environment are rejected with 409.

post.description: Triggers a discovery refresh of the global model catalog (also runs hourly on a schedule).

schema.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).

parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).
parameters.name: archived

patch.summary: Update or archive a self-hosted runner

get.summary: Read the current runner heartbeat state

put.summary: Replace the current runner heartbeat state

get.summary: Read a queued self-hosted work item

post.summary: Claim a specific available work item for a runner

404.description: Work item or runner not found

409.description: Work item is no longer available

patch.summary: Renew or finish a work lease

get.summary: Open a claimed runner session WebSocket channel

101.description: Runner session channel accepted as a WebSocket upgrade

200.description: Runner session channel metadata for OpenAPI clients

409.description: A policy already exists for this scope

get.description: Merges organization, team, and project policies with enabled budgets. Pass teamId to resolve the policy as a member of that team. Pass providerId and modelId together to attach a policy decision for that provider/model pair.

409.description: Connection already exists or credential unavailable

patch.summary: Update connection state, credential, or settings

post.summary: Execute a connection tool through the AMA policy boundary

201.description: Tool call executed and recorded (state reports success or error)

schema.description: URI of the created tool call resource

Location.description: URI of the created tool call resource

404.description: Connection, session, or tool not found

get.description: Lists usage records for the project. Send Accept: text/csv to export the filtered records as CSV.
Read-only aggregation of usage records grouped by provider, model, or agent.
Lists audit records for the organization. Send Accept: text/csv to export the filtered records as CSV.

schema.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).

parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).
parameters.name: archived

patch.summary: Update, pause, or archive a trigger
patch.description: Partial update. Pause with `enabled: false`; archive with `archived: true`; restore with `archived: false`.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the trigger and its run history.

schema.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).

parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).
parameters.name: archived

patch.description: Partial update: title and metadata edits, the stop transition (state: "stopped"), and lifecycle archiving (archived: true|false).

post.summary: Send a prompt message to a session

get.summary: Read a session message delivery state

get.description: Content negotiation: application/json returns a paginated list, text/csv exports the filtered events, text/event-stream streams new events as SSE.

post.description: Event ingest for runners and clients. Runner OIDC tokens are accepted only while the runner holds an active lease attached to the session.

get.summary: List tool approvals for a session

patch.summary: Approve or deny a pending tool call
patch.description: Records the human decision for a paused tool call. Approval resumes the runtime and executes the tool (or records the provided custom result); denial resumes the runtime with the denial.

404.description: Session or pending approval not found

schema.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).

parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle. Defaults to false (live resources only).
parameters.name: archived

patch.description: Partial update. Archive with `archived: true`; restore with `archived: false`.

patch.summary: Update or revoke vault credential metadata

post.summary: Rotate a vault credential by creating a new version

delete.summary: Delete an unused vault credential version
delete.description: Hard delete. The active version and versions pinned by live runtime metadata cannot be deleted.
